zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Nicholas Becker Sr於1701年12月19日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆時，他的父親Johan Peter Becker30歲，母親Anna Petronella Wendel23歲。他於1723年1月19日與Anna Marie Schworm在德國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1762年12月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫申南多阿 瓦利享年61歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Nicholas Becker Sr于1701年12月19日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 阿爾澤-喬姆斯福拉莫斯海姆时，他的父亲Johan Peter Becker30岁，母亲Anna Petronella Wendel23岁。他于1723年1月19日与Anna Marie Schworm在德国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1762年12月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州登莫申南多阿 瓦利享年61岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州弗雷德里克。

nameMeanings.name: Becker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch: occupational name for a baker of bread, or brick and tiles, derived from Middle High German and Middle Dutch backen ‘to bake’. The German surname is also found in France (mainly Lorraine and Alsace).
Danish: occupational name for a baker, from bechere ‘baker’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a baker, from German Bäcker (compare 1 and Backer ) or Yiddish beker ‘baker’.

variants.name: Backer
meanings: German (Bäcker): variant of Becker . Compare Baecker .
Dutch: variant of   Bakker  . Compare   De Backer  .
Danish: probably of German origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Beckers
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ewald, Gerda, Hans, Klaus, Kurt, Wendelin, Wilhelmina.  French Jacques, Thierry.
Dutch, Flemish, and German: variant of Becker + the genitive case -s.

variants.name: Baecker
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Siegfried, Bodo, Gerhardt, Heinz, Horst, Kurt, Waltraud.
German (mainly Bäcker): variant of Becker . Compare Backer .

variants.name: Beck
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived beside a stream, from northern Middle English bekke ‘stream’ (Old Norse bekkr).

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of various places in northern France named Bec, for example Bec Hellouin in Eure, named with Old Norman French bec ‘stream’, from the same Old Norse root as in 1 above.
English: from the Middle English personal name Becke (Old English Becca or Beocca), of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Beckerle
meanings: South German: diminutive of   Becker  .

variants.name: De Beck
meanings: Flemish: short form of De Becker, see Becker , or a variant of Beckman .

variants.name: Beckermann
meanings: German: variant of Becker ‘baker’, formed with Middle High German man ‘man’.

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Vernacular form of   Johannes .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

variants.name: Nicolas
meanings: From Late Greek. See Nicholas .

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Nicholas Becker Sr was born on 19 December 1701, in Framersheim, Alzey-Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, his father, Johan Peter Becker, was 30 and his mother, Anna Petronella Wendel, was 23. He married Anna Marie Schworm on 19 January 1723, in Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 27 December 1762, in Shenandoah Valley, Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johann Nicholas Becker Sr est né le 19 décembre 1701, à Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Johan Peter Becker, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anna Petronella Wendel, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anna Marie Schworm le 19 janvier 1723, à Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 décembre 1762, à Shenandoah Valley, Dunmore, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Frederick, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johann Nicholas Becker Sr am 19. Dezember 1701 in Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johan Peter Becker 30 und seine Mutter Anna Petronella Wendel 23. Er hat am 19. Januar 1723 in Deutschland Anna Marie Schworm geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Dezember 1762 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Shenandoah Valley, Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Nicholas Becker Sr è nato il il 19 dicembre 1701 nel Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, il suo padre, Johan Peter Becker, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Anna Petronella Wendel, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anna Marie Schworm il 19 gennaio 1723, nel Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 dicembre 1762, nel Shenandoah Valley, Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Nicholas Becker Srが1701年12月19日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス アルズエイ-ウオルムズフラムルシェイムで生まれた時，父Johan Peter Beckerは30歳，母Anna Petronella Wendelは23歳であった。1723年1月19日にドイツでAnna Marie Schwormと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1762年12月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ダンモーシェナンドア ヴァリーで61歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州フレデリックにて埋葬された。

ko.Home Farm, Mulberry Run, Fredrick, Virgi: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프레더릭크
ko.Nieder Erlenbach, Frankfurt am Main, Hes: 독일 헤센 프랭k퍼트 아 맹 니더 를렌바치
ko.Shenandoah Valley, Shenandoah, Colony of: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 던모어 셰난도 발리
ko.lifeSummary: Johann Nicholas Becker Sr(이)가 1701년 12월 19일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 알즈이-워스 프레이머셰임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johan Peter Becker(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Petronella Wendel(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1723년 1월 19일 독일에서 Anna Marie Schworm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1762년 12월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 던모어 셰난도 발리에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프레더릭크에 묻혔다.

pt.Fredericksburg, Virginia, United States: Fredericksburg, Rockbridge, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América
pt.Nieder Erlenbach, Frankfurt am Main, Hes: Nieder Erlenbach, Frankfurt am Main, Hessen, Alemanha
pt.Shenandoah Valley, Shenandoah, Colony of: Shenandoah Valley, Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Nicholas Becker Sr nasceu em 19 de dezembro de 1701, em Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Johan Peter Becker, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anna Petronella Wendel, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Marie Schworm em 19 de janeiro de 1723, em Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1762, em Shenandoah Valley, Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.Shenandoah Valley, Shenandoah, Colony of: шенандоах валли, дунмор, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Nicholas Becker Sr родился 19 декабря 1701 г. в местности фрамиршим, ландкрис алзи-вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, его отцу по имени Johan Peter Becker было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Petronella Wendel, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Marie Schworm 19 января 1723 г. в местности Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 27 декабря 1762 г. в местности шенандоах валли, дунмор, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности фредирикк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Nicholas Becker Sr nació el 19 de diciembre de 1701, en Framersheim, Landkreis Alzey-Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Johan Peter Becker, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anna Petronella Wendel, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anna Marie Schworm el 19 de enero de 1723, en Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1762, en Shenandoah Valley, Dunmore, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Frederick, Virginia, British Colonial America.
